name: spec-workflow
description: Explicitly invoked spec-first workflows with Kiro-compatible indexes, requirements analysis, task graphs, resumable progress, MCP task and acceptance updates, hook guards, and bounded layered acceptance.

interface.shortDescription: Explicit opt-in workflow for approved spec-driven coding work.
interface.longDescription: Spec workflow runs only when the user explicitly invokes it. It adds intake-first clarification, Kiro-style requirements analysis, spec.yml/progress.md state files, structured task graphs, MCP-backed task and acceptance updates, hook guard templates, controlled implementation, local pre-acceptance, and strict resumable final acceptance with review/adversarial agents, isolated acceptance fixes, and bounded retry policy before reporting completion.
defaultPrompt: Use spec-workflow to clarify this request before writing the spec.
Use spec-workflow to create a spec before implementing this feature.
Use spec-workflow to plan this design-first change before coding.
Use spec-workflow to write a bugfix spec for this regression.
Use spec-workflow to run final acceptance for this completed workflow.
Use spec-workflow to resume this interrupted workflow from docs/specs/progress.md.
